heads: Inter Group Receipts / Payments (other than Girnar India)

Salary and Related: Salary payment including ESI, EPF, Ptax, etc

descriptions.Sales Collection: Car sales from new auto business (CarDekho new cars)
descriptions.Other Receipts: ESOP exercise payments from employees into salary accounts
descriptions.Salary and Related: Actual salary disbursement, PF, ESI, professional tax
descriptions.Tax Payments (GST & TDS Excl. Salaries): TDS on vendor payments, professional fees etc. Note the space before 'other'
descriptions.Other Payments: MDR, GST on bank services, CC MDR, Softex commission, EROUTE, small GST amounts
descriptions.Contra - DSA accounts: Transfers to DSA account 3352 from non-DSA accounts
descriptions.Contra - Unidentified: Suspected contra but cannot confirm the matching leg
descriptions.Treasury receipts: ONLY for bank account deposit interest (DEPOSIT INTEREST on HSBC). FD interest and Int on FD/RD should go to FD redeem — user will split later.
descriptions.Sale / Purchase of FD & Investments: FD principal closure/redemption. NOTE: use this exact head with spaces around /
descriptions.Inter Group Receipts / Payments (other t: Payments to Girnar Capital Pvt Ltd
descriptions.Investment in subsidiaries: Investment flows from InsuranceDekho (via Varalakshmi Enterprises)
descriptions.Interest & WCTL fees: OD interest charges (Int.Coll on Kotak, DEBIT INTEREST on HSBC)
descriptions.Transaction due to account freezing: Only for AXOS transactions on GSPL-Yes-0286. Account freezing related
